author: codex-duplicate-audit

patch.value: Duplicate audit 2026-05-22: weekdayOrderIndex is repeated in four recurrence/calendar modules: src/core/item/item-format.ts:100, src/cli/commands/create.ts:510, src/cli/commands/update.ts:686, and src/cli/commands/calendar.ts:138. Each copy wraps RECURRENCE_WEEKDAY_VALUES.indexOf(value), making recurrence parsing/serialization/calendar expansion drift-prone. Existing recurrence implementation items are closed, and open pm-why9 covers create/update parser blocks but not the shared item-format/calendar weekday helper.

One shared recurrence weekday ordering helper is exported from the appropriate item/time module; item serialization, create/update parsing, and calendar expansion use it; recurrence ordering behavior stays covered; focused recurrence/calendar tests and pnpm build pass.

value.author: codex-duplicate-audit
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: pm search 'weekdayOrderIndex RECURRENCE_WEEKDAY_VALUES recurrence weekday order' found only closed recurrence work plus unrelated pm-8fx3; no active exact helper-dedup item.

message: Create duplicate-audit finding for recurrence weekday helper
